message:
Command `
# Locate the project root and design directories
DESIGN="mspm33c321a_derivative"
find /workspace -maxdepth 3 -type d -name "${DESIGN}_mcu" 2>/dev/null
find /workspace -maxdepth 3 -type f -name "config.json" 2>/dev/null | grep -E "${DESIGN}" | head -20
` executed with exit code 0.

function.arguments:
{"command": "

DESIGN="mspm33c321a_derivative"
find /workspace -maxdepth 3 -type d -name "${DESIGN}_mcu" 2>/dev/null
find /workspace -maxdepth 3 -type f -name "config.json" 2>/dev/null | grep -E "${DESIGN}" | head -20
"}
function.name: execute_bash
